cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. The user provided a table with penguin data and wants to know how many penguins are more than 5 years old and weigh more than 12 kg. The options are from A to E. Let me list out each penguin's details to make sure I have them right. Starting with Louis: name is Louis, age 7, height 50 cm, weight 11 kg. Bernard is next: age 5, height 80 cm, weight 13 kg. So both conditions need to be satisfied. Let me check each penguin one by one. First, Louis. Age is 7, which is more than 5. His weight is 11 kg, which is less than 12.
